title: Thai-Style Bean Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Thai-style bean stew made with a variety of spices and ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the stew and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the Mexican bean, coconut milk, fish sauce, and brown sugar.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
